creator: nate@root.org
text:
Coleman Kane wrote:
> Nate Lawson wrote:
>> Does it work if you disable acpi?
>> hint.acpi.0.disabled="1"
>>   
> Tried it with that loader hint (actually I chose the disable ACPI option
> from the bootloader menu) and I still get the same errors from both drivers.
> 
> Below is the lspci -d 1002:4383 -xxxx -v output for the card:
> 00:14.2 Class 0403: Unknown device 1002:4383
>         Subsystem: Unknown device 103c:30c2
>         Flags: bus master, slow devsel, latency 64, IRQ 16
>         Memory at d0608000 (64-bit, non-prefetchable)
>         Capabilities: [50] Power Management version 2
> 00: 02 10 83 43 06 00 10 04 00 00 03 04 10 40 00 00
> 10: 04 80 60 d0 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 20: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 3c 10 c2 30
> 30: 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 01 00 00
> 40: 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00
> 50: 01 00 42 c8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 60: 05 00 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 70: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 80: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 90: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> a0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> b0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> c0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> d0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> e0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> f0: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
> 
> Below is the pciconf -lvc:
> pcm0@pci0:0:20:2:       class=0x040300 card=0x30c2103c chip=0x43831002
> rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
>     vendor     = 'ATI Technologies Inc'
>     device     = 'IXP SB600 High Definition Audio Controller'
>     class      = multimedia
>     cap 01[50] = powerspec 2  supports D0 D3  current D0

If it is the same problem with/without acpi, then it can't be an acpi
problem.  Perhaps someone else has a clue?

-- 
Nate
